headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, and the Colorado Rockies defeated the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. Heliot Ramos has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. Other players on the injured list include Ben Joyce (right shoulder inflammation), Trevor Story (sports hernia), Clay Holmes (right fibula fracture), Max Fried (left elbow bone bruise), Matt Strahm (right knee inflammation), Matt Waldron (right brachialis muscle injury), and Blake Snell (left elbow loose bodies).

The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded right-handed pitcher Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams and traded right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Ramos Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants left fielder Heliot Ramos has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. The injury occurred on May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. This move adds depth to the White Sox outfield.
